title: Butter Report - Open Government Portal
content:
Global Affairs Canada has archived a number of older trade reports and notices that were previously available online. These documents are preserved on the Open Government Portal and are available both as individual records and grouped into commodity-based datasets for convenience.
This collection is not exhaustive and should be used for research and reference purposes only.
For current information on importing, exporting, trade reports, and related rules and regulations, please visit Global Affairs Canada’s International Trade and Investment webpage: https://international.canada.ca/en/services/business/trade
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Global Affairs Canada
- Publisher - Organization Section Name: ITA
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Butter Report CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Data Dictionary - Butter XLSX English French data_dictionary XLSX Explore More information Download
